creator: olivier@gid0.org
text:
A new patch is available upstream against 20080602 sources. Add it to PATCHFILES.
Changes : Should fix the map saving problem and a couple of memory access bugs in Mapster32 (and fix frequent crashes anyone was experiencing with autosave). Adds mousewheel control for the number of points to add when using the circle points tool.

Fix: Apply following patch.
Thanks :)
How-To-Repeat: N/A
